debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : ¬r = 0
h : Meromorphic f
this :
  MeasureTheory.AEStronglyMeasurable (fun x => log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x.1) - circleMap 0 1 x.2‖)
    ((MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi))).prod (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi))))
τ₁ :
  MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun y => ∫ (x : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖|)
      (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi))) ↔
    MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun x => ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖|)
      (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))
⊢ False

failed_attempts:

      (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi))) := by

    exact (by

have : False := by

    exact (not_false).1 rfl
  exact this
